def test_knapsack_exactly_fills_capacity():

    expected_value = 15
    assert knapsack(capacity, items) == expected_value

attempts.test_code:
import pytest
from source import knapsack

def test_knapsack_exactly_fills_capacity():
    capacity = 3
    items = [(3, 10), (1, 5)]
    expected_value = 10
    actual_value = knapsack(capacity, items)
    assert actual_value == expected_value, f"Expected knapsack({capacity}, {items}) to return {expected_value}, but got {actual_value}"
